_note: Fixture for eval 1 — diff implements both settlement timeout scenarios but test file only covers scenario 1 (timeout warning). Scenario 2 (automatic cancellation after grace period) has no test.

task.title: Task: Handle settlement timeout
task.body:
## Description

Detect when a settlement exceeds its processing window and automatically cancel it after the grace period expires.

## Gherkin Scenarios

```gherkin
Scenario: Merchant sees a timeout warning when settlement exceeds the processing window
  Given a settlement has been in processing for longer than the processing window
  When the settlement status is checked
  Then the merchant receives a timeout warning notification
  And the settlement status is updated to 'warning'

Scenario: Settlement is automatically cancelled after the timeout grace period expires
  Given a settlement has been in 'warning' status for longer than the grace period
  When the timeout grace period check runs
  Then the settlement status is updated to 'cancelled'
  And a cancellation event is emitted
```

## Contracts & Interfaces

```typescript
interface SettlementTimeoutResult {
  settlementId: string;
  status: 'warning' | 'cancelled';
  triggeredAt: string; // ISO 8601
}
```

## Impacted Areas

- `src/services/settlement.ts`
- `src/services/settlement.test.ts`

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Both Gherkin scenarios have passing tests
- [ ] Cancellation event is emitted on auto-cancel
- [ ] Observability: log entries on each state transition
